zh.lifeSummary: 當Louis de Bourbon II le Bon, duc de Bourbon於1337年2月4日出生在法國布爾波乃斯時，他的父親Duc Pierre De Bourbon I25歲，母親Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon23歲。他於1371年8月19日與Anne d'Auvergne在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也布爾波-利阿哈波奧爾特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1410年8月19日在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也蒙特盧c享年73歲，埋葬在法國奧維阿利也索維尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Louis de Bourbon II le Bon, duc de Bourbon于1337年2月4日出生在法国布爾波乃斯时，他的父亲Duc Pierre De Bourbon I25岁，母亲Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon23岁。他于1371年8月19日与Anne d'Auvergne在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也布爾波-利阿哈波奧爾特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1410年8月19日在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也蒙特盧c享年73岁，埋葬在法国奧維阿利也索維尼。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourbon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from a village in Allier, the site of the (now ruined) castle of Bourbon, or from another place called (Le) Bourbon, mainly in the southern part of France. The placename is derived from a Celtic and pre-Celtic element borb- denoting a hot spring.

History: The progenitor of a large part of the American bearers of the surname Bourbon was Jean-Pierre Bourbon from Salins-les-Bains in Jura, France, who settled in MO in the middle of the 19th century. However, many bearers of the surname claim a connection with the house of Bourbon, which provided generations of monarchs of France and Spain and other European royalty. It takes its name from the castle of Bourbon in Allier, which was held by Adhémar, a 9th-century noble. His descendant Beatrice, heiress of Bourbon, married Robert of Clermont, 6th son of King Louis IX of France, in 1272, and these two are considered founders of the royal house. Robert's son Louis was created Duke of Bourbon in 1327. By the 16th century they had added much of southern France, the dukedom of Vendôme, and the kingdom of Navarre to their fiefs, and in 1589 a Bourbon succeeded to the throne of France as Henry IV. His grandson, Louis XIV, called ‘the Sun King’, reigned 1643–1715, presiding over a golden age of French literature and art and attempting to establish French supremacy in Europe. The Bourbons ruled France until the Revolution in 1793 and again 1815–48. The present claimants to the French throne are descended from Louis XIV's brother, Philippe, Duke of Orléans. The Bourbons acquired the Spanish throne in 1700, when a grandson of Louis XIV succeeded as Philip V; they ruled until 1931 and were restored, in the person of King Juan Carlos, in 1975. The Bourbon kings of the Two Sicilies (i.e. Sicily and Naples), 1759–1861, and Bourbon dukes of Parma, 1748–1860, were descended from the Spanish branch of the family.

variants.name: Borbon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Ana, Jesus, Marta, Miguel Angel, Tomas, Ademar, Alfredo, Ana Maria, Bernabe, Berta, Carlos.

nameMeanings.name: Louis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

variants.name: Lewie
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Louis  , or a pet form of   Lewis .

variants.name: Louie
meanings: Variant spelling of   Lewie   or   Louis  , currently in fashion.

variants.name: Lewi
meanings: form, since the Middle Ages, of the French name Louis . In modern use it is also in part a transferred use of the surname derived from this given name, or from Anglicized forms of Gaelic Mac Lughaidh ‘son of Lughaidh ’ or Welsh Llewelyn .

en.lifeSummary: When Louis de Bourbon II le Bon, duc de Bourbon was born on 4 February 1337, in Bourbonnais, France, his father, Duc Pierre De Bourbon I, was 25 and his mother, Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon, was 23. He married Anne d'Auvergne on 19 August 1371, in Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 19 August 1410, in Montluçon, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 73, and was buried in Souvigny, Allier, Auvergne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Louis de Bourbon II le Bon, duc de Bourbon est né le 4 février 1337, à Bourbonnais, France, son père, Duc Pierre De Bourbon I, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Anne d'Auvergne le 19 août 1371, à Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 19 août 1410, à Montluçon, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Souvigny, Allier, Auvergne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Louis de Bourbon II le Bon, duc de Bourbon am 4. Februar 1337 in Bourbonnais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Duc Pierre De Bourbon I 25 und seine Mutter Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon 23. Er hat am 19. August 1371 in Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich Anne d'Auvergne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 19. August 1410 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Montluçon, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich und wurde in Souvigny, Allier, Auvergne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Louis de Bourbon II le Bon, duc de Bourbon è nato il il 4 febbraio 1337 nel Bourbonnais, Francia, il suo padre, Duc Pierre De Bourbon I, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Anne d'Auvergne il 19 agosto 1371, nel Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 19 agosto 1410, nel Montluçon, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Souvigny, Allier, Auvergne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Louis de Bourbon II le Bon, duc de Bourbonが1337年2月4日にフランスボウルボナイスで生まれた時，父Duc Pierre De Bourbon Iは25歳，母Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbonは23歳であった。1371年8月19日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスアリールボウルボン-ル'アルチャンバウルトでAnne d'Auvergneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1410年8月19日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスアリールモントルcオンで73歳で死去し，フランスアウバーグンアリールソウヴィグニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Louis de Bourbon II le Bon, duc de Bourbon(이)가 1337년 2월 4일 프랑스 부르보나이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Duc Pierre De Bourbon I(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1371년 8월 19일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 앨리어 부르보-'아르챔바트에서 Anne d'Auvergne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1410년 8월 19일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 앨리어 몽루c에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 오버그니 앨리어 소우비그니에 묻혔다.

pt.4 FEB 1337–19 AUG 1410: 4 de fevereiro de 1337–19 de agosto de 1410
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Louis de Bourbon II le Bon, duc de Bourbon nasceu em 4 de fevereiro de 1337, em Bourbonnais, França, seu pai, Duc Pierre De Bourbon I, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne d'Auvergne em 19 de agosto de 1371, em Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de agosto de 1410, em Montluçon, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Souvigny, Allier, Auvergne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Louis de Bourbon II le Bon, duc de Bourbon родился 4 февраля 1337 г. в местности бурбоннеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Duc Pierre De Bourbon I было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne d'Auvergne 19 августа 1371 г. в местности бурбон-л'арчамбаулт, аллиир, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 19 августа 1410 г. в местности монтлуcон, аллиир, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности соувигни, аллиир, аувиргн, Франция.

es.4 FEB 1337–19 AUG 1410: 4 de febrero de 1337–19 de agosto de 1410
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Louis de Bourbon II le Bon, duc de Bourbon nació el 4 de febrero de 1337, en Bourbonnais, Francia, su papá, Duc Pierre De Bourbon I, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Anne d'Auvergne el 19 de agosto de 1371, en Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 19 de agosto de 1410, en Montluçon, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Souvigny, Allier, Auvergne, Francia.
